records.ety: [AS. īfig; akin to OHG. ebawi, ebah, G. epheu.]

defs: A plant of the genus Hedera (Hedera helix), common in Europe. Its leaves are evergreen, dark, smooth, shining, and mostly five-pointed; the flowers yellowish and small; the berries black or yellow. The stem clings to walls and trees by rootlike fibers.
quotes: Direct The clasping ivy where to climb.
Ye myrtles brown, with ivy never sere.
